productDisplayName: Lotto Men Dolce Vita II Black Sports Shoes
description: Designed for the Sports junkie who never compromises on style and comfort, theDolce Vita II shoe from lotto comes with a durable upper and a grippy rubber outsole that keeps you stable on various surfaces.UpperFoamy rubber upper with mesh inlays on the forefoot and rearfoot with perforations on the midfoot areaCentral lace-ups with a padded tonguePadded mesh inner with a soft footbedBranding on the tongue and the heel collarOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the toe region to act as the toe guardMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleDurable lotto Lite outsole Punto Flex grooves on the forefoot for easy movementWaffle patterned lugs all overShoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
